scripts.prod:frontend: dotenv -e frontend/.env.prod -- yarn workspace frontend dev
scripts.prod:build:frontend: dotenv -e frontend/.env.prod -- yarn workspace frontend build
scripts.prod:start:frontend: dotenv -e frontend/.env.prod -- yarn workspace frontend start
scripts.prod:server:local: dotenv -e server/.env.prod -- yarn workspace server dev
scripts.prod:server: yarn workspace server build && yarn workspace server start
scripts.build: yarn workspace @agrospace/shared build && yarn workspace frontend build && yarn workspace server build
